package_name: CyberShield AI Decision Assurance Static MVP Demo Package
primary_workflow: AI-generated recommendation in -> AI Trust Decision Record out

routes.label: Demo Control Room
routes.purpose: Run the demo in the recommended order.

routes.label: AI Decision Assurance Launch Page
routes.purpose: Introduce the product story and launch the main demo routes.

routes.label: ATDR Workbench
routes.purpose: Run the guided AI Trust Decision Record workflow.

routes.label: Executive Brief Preview
routes.purpose: Show the standalone AI Trust Decision Record artifact and browser print/PDF path.

routes.label: Evidence Workbench Guide
routes.purpose: Explain evidence strength, weakness, freshness, authority, and scope caveats.

routes.label: Human Review Workflow Guide
routes.purpose: Explain reviewer roles, decision states, required notes, caveats, and residual risk acknowledgment.

routes.label: Demo Readiness Check
routes.purpose: Run deterministic GO / NO-GO checks across all static demo paths.

routes.label: Trust Kernel
routes.purpose: Preserve access to the existing CyberShield trust surface.

go_no_go_checks: Vendor-risk demo atomizes into expected claim structure
Every demo produces Risk If Wrong
Framework mappings include not-verified-as-compliant warning language
non_claims: No server-side DOCX or PDF generation
